message:
Add FR-P2C-004 auth gate and ACL conformance tests with fixture updates

Expand the fr-conformance harness with three new unit tests covering
the FR-P2C-004 (auth/security) contract packet:

- fr_p2c_004_u005: noauth gate precedes dispatch -- verifies that
  unauthenticated commands hitting RequiresAuth are rejected before
  dispatch, with structured log emission validation
- fr_p2c_004_u007: ACL selector parser rejects malformed rules --
  validates token parsing for +@, -@, ~, &, > prefixes and known
  literals, with structured log on rejection
- fr_p2c_004_u009: ACL permission enforcement denies unauthorized
  commands -- exercises allow-set gating with first_denied_index
  and validates structured log for denied command paths

Supporting changes:
- Add AuthState, CommandAuthClass enums and enforce_noauth_gate,
  parse_acl_selector_tokens, allow_set, first_denied_index helpers
- Extend packet_family_for_fixture with FR-P2C-004 name mappings
  and a wildcard prefix fallback
- Update FR-P2C-004.golden.jsonl to reference the new canonical
  test name and rch-based replay command
- Update user_workflow_corpus_v1.json unit_hook to match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,8 +107,8 @@

       "unit_hook": {
         "suite_id": "unit::fr-p2c-004",
-        "test_or_scenario_id": "fr-p2c-004::unit_contract_smoke",
-        "replay_cmd": "FR_MODE=strict FR_SEED=17 cargo test -p fr-runtime fr-p2c-004::unit_contract_smoke -- --nocapture",
+        "test_or_scenario_id": "fr_p2c_004_u005_noauth_gate_precedes_dispatch_and_logs",
+        "replay_cmd": "FR_MODE=strict FR_SEED=17 rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture fr_p2c_004_u005_noauth_gate_precedes_dispatch_and_logs",
         "owner_bead": "bd-2wb.15.5"
